title: Sanji Leaves the Baratie Behind
scene: On pages 17–18, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Sanji leaves the restaurant behind, joining Luffy’s crew while the cooks hide their emotions behind insults.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Goddamn it! We're gonna be lonely without ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Men should say their good-byes silently.

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
